overall.description: A cinematic aerial drone shot through a snow-covered traditional Asian mountain village in a video game, featuring wooden architecture with icicles, warm glowing windows, and misty mountain backdrops. The camera glides smoothly over rooftops revealing the village layout and narrow streets below.

scene_state.functional_zone: snow-covered mountain village rooftop with icicles

events.description: camera begins gradual leftward pan while maintaining forward motion over the rooftops

agents.ego_description: slowly gliding over the snow-covered rooftops observing the village architecture below

notable_agents.action: standing motionless on the snow-covered rooftop near the chimney

entered.detail: snow-laden roof with metal chimney and long icicles hanging from the eaves
long icicles hanging from the roof edge, glowing with warm interior light
multi-story wooden structure with curved Asian-style roof and lit windows
steep rocky mountain face partially obscured by mist and fog

segments.scene_description: The segment opens with an aerial view of a snow-covered rooftop featuring a chimney and dramatic icicles. A lone character stands on the roof as the camera glides forward, revealing adjacent wooden traditional buildings with warm lights glowing from within. The misty mountain cliffs loom in the background, establishing the remote village setting.

scene_state.functional_zone: elevated wooden walkway above village street

events.description: camera descends slightly revealing more warm lantern light from the street level below

agents.ego_description: continuing forward while descending to reveal the village street and wooden walkways below

entered.detail: narrow snow-covered street running through the village with warm lighting
raised wooden platform connecting buildings with railings
tall wooden pole with red and white prayer flags fluttering

segments.scene_description: The camera descends slightly while moving forward, transitioning from rooftop level to an elevated view of the village street below. Wooden walkways and bridges connect the traditional buildings, while prayer flags become visible on the left. The warm glow of street lanterns contrasts with the cool blue snow, and the initial rooftop with the chimney passes out of view behind the camera.

scene_state.functional_zone: mountain village main street with cliff walls

events.description: view opens to reveal the full depth of the village street leading toward distant mountain peaks

agents.ego_description: flying down the main village street toward the mountain pass, revealing the scale of the settlement

entered.detail: steep rocky cliff wall forming the natural boundary of the village
snow-capped mountain peak visible through the fog at the end of the street

segments.scene_description: The final segment continues down the village's main street, with the camera revealing the full depth of the settlement nestled between steep mountain cliffs. Prayer flags move from the background to the mid-ground as the camera advances. The view opens to show distant snow-capped peaks through the fog, emphasizing the remote, isolated nature of this traditional mountain village.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous aerial glide that descends from a high rooftop perspective into the heart of a remote, snow-covered mountain village. It begins atop a wooden roof where a lone character stands beside a chimney draped in icicles, with misty cliffs looming in the distance. As the camera glides forward and descends, the view shifts from the rooftops to an elevated perspective of the village streets, revealing wooden walkways, bridges, and the warm glow of lanterns contrasting against the cool blue snow. The scene then expands further down the main thoroughfare, passing colorful prayer flags that move into the mid-ground as the settlement's full depth is revealed. Finally, the camera advances toward the horizon, opening the view to distant snow-capped peaks emerging through the fog to emphasize the village's isolation.
